summary: Functional solution with good Bash practices. Issues: (1) actions/checkout@v4 not pinned to SHA—should use full commit hash per YAML best practices; (2) generate-matrix.sh duplicates Cartesian product and filtering logic across two jq invocations, forcing maintainers to update algorithm in two places; (3) workflow test steps repeat pattern (echo header, run generate-matrix, jq extract, echo result) that should be factored; (4) complex jq lacks explanatory comments on algorithm. Would require refactoring before shipping.
